title: dryopteris repanda
intro: Dryopteris repanda, also known as the scaly male fern, is a type of fern native to Asia and Eastern Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Dryopteris repanda include its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
